fields.name: finalizeTriggerSolFeeAmount
docs: Trigger fee paid to finalize signer (Raydium `finalize` path).

fields.name: finalizeDammV2TriggerSolFeeAmount
docs: Trigger fee paid to finalize signer (Meteora DAMM v2 `finalize_damm_v2` path).

accounts.name: AmmConfig
docs: Holds the current owner of the factory

fields.name: tradeFeeRate
docs: The trade fee, denominated in hundredths of a bip (10^-6)

fields.name: fundFeeRate
docs: The fund fee, denominated in hundredths of a bip (10^-6)

fields.name: nftMint
docs: Mint address of the tokenized position

fields.name: poolId
docs: The ID of the pool with which this token is connected

fields.name: tickLowerIndex
docs: The lower bound tick of the position

fields.name: tickUpperIndex
docs: The upper bound tick of the position

fields.name: liquidity
docs: The amount of liquidity owned by this position

fields.name: feeGrowthInside0LastX64
docs: The token_0 fee growth of the aggregate position as of the last action on the individual position

fields.name: feeGrowthInside1LastX64
docs: The token_1 fee growth of the aggregate position as of the last action on the individual position

fields.name: tokenFeesOwed0
docs: The fees owed to the position owner in token_0, as of the last computation

fields.name: tokenFeesOwed1
docs: The fees owed to the position owner in token_1, as of the last computation

fields.name: lpMint
docs: Pool tokens are issued when A or B tokens are deposited.
Pool tokens can be withdrawn back to the original A or B token.

fields.name: observationKey
docs: observation account to store oracle data

fields.name: status
docs: Bitwise representation of the state of the pool

fields.name: protocolFeesToken0
docs: The amounts of token_0 and token_1 that are owed to the liquidity provider.

fields.name: openTime
docs: The timestamp allowed for swap in the pool.

fields.name: positionOwner
docs: The owner who has locked clmm NFT

fields.name: poolId
docs: The ID of the pool with which this record is connected

fields.name: positionId
docs: The ID of the position with which this record is connected

fields.name: lockedNftAccount
docs: Program ATA locked NFT account or user ATA position NFT account

fields.name: feeNftMint
docs: nft mint to check who has authority to collect fee

fields.name: lockedLpAmount
docs: The Locked liquidity amount without claimed lp fee

fields.name: lastLp
docs: Last updated cp pool lp total supply

fields.name: poolId
docs: The ID of the pool with which this record is connected

fields.name: feeNftMint
docs: nft mint to check who has authority to collect fee

fields.name: lockedOwner
docs: The owner who has locked liquidity

fields.name: lockedLpMint
docs: The mint of locked lp token

types.name: BaseFeeParameters
docs: Base Fee Parameters - must match DAMM v2 exactly (just a byte array)

types.name: DynamicFeeParameters
docs: Dynamic Fee Parameters - must match DAMM v2 exactly

types.name: PoolFeeParameters
docs: Pool Fee Parameters - must match DAMM v2 exactly

types.name: Observation
docs: The element of observations in ObservationState

fields.name: blockTimestamp
docs: The block timestamp of the observation

fields.name: sqrtPriceX64
docs: the price of the observation timestamp, Q64.64

fields.name: cumulativeTimePriceX64
docs: the cumulative of price during the duration time, Q64.64

fields.name: liquidityNet
docs: Amount of net liquidity added (subtracted) when tick is crossed from left to right (right to left)

fields.name: liquidityGross
docs: The total position liquidity that references this tick

fields.name: feeGrowthOutside0X64
docs: Fee growth per unit of liquidity on the _other_ side of this tick (relative to the current tick)
only has relative meaning, not absolute — the value depends on when the tick is initialized

errors.name: ExcessiveFees
errors.msg: Fee in bips should not exceed 500

errors.name: PreSimpleSolSquareOverflow
errors.msg: Pre Simple Sol Square Multiplication Overflow

errors.msg: Pre Simple Market Cap Subtraction Liquidity Overflow

errors.msg: Pre Simple Owner Fee Subtraction Overflow

errors.msg: Pre Simple Liquidity Fee Multiplication Overflow

errors.msg: Pre Simple Market Cap Final Subtraction Overflow

errors.msg: Amount out with fee multiplication overflow

errors.msg: Amount out with fee division failed

errors.name: InvalidFeeDistribution
errors.msg: Fee distribution percentage exceeds maximum allowed

errors.name: NotAuthorizedFeeCollect
errors.msg: Not authorized to collect LP fees

errors.name: SymbolTooLong
errors.msg: Token symbol exceeds Metaplex limit (max 10 bytes). Use a short ticker; put longer text in name or off-chain JSON (uri).

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: Token name exceeds Metaplex limit (max 32 bytes)

errors.name: EmptyTokenMetadata
errors.msg: Token name and symbol are required for metadata update
